completed_steps.summary: Classified as a monolith with 1 part: a TypeScript library package with browser and Node adapter entrypoints.
Inventoried existing repository documentation across root, docs, demo, and GitHub workflow areas.
Confirmed the primary technology stack as strict TypeScript on Node 24 with tsup, Vitest, n3, and optional SQLite support.
Completed exhaustive conditional analysis of source, demo, tests, Solid adapter behavior, and automation workflows.
Generated the annotated source tree and critical directory summary.
Documented local development, release automation, and contributor expectations.
Generated the single-part architecture document covering engine, storage, sync, and Solid adapter layers.
Generated supporting brownfield overview and subsystem inventory documents.
Generated the master documentation index as the primary AI retrieval entrypoint.

technology_stack.tech_summary: TypeScript library targeting Node 24+ with tsup bundling, Vitest testing, n3 RDF handling, IndexedDB browser storage, and SQLite Node storage.

batches_completed.summary: Scanned core engine, storage adapters, RDF helpers, and Solid transport modules.
Scanned public API, storage, demo, and Pod integration coverage.
Scanned CLI demo app, entities, and ontology assets.
Scanned architecture, API, planning, and testing documents for project context.
Scanned CI and publish workflows for operational documentation.

resume_instructions: Workflow completed. For future updates, rerun document-project and choose full rescan or deep dive.
